column25: One of the meaningful achievements I would like to share is from my school and college days, where I had the opportunity to grow as a leader and communicator. It taught me leadership, teamwork, and time management. Another proud moment was when I got the chance to be the Master of Ceremonies (MC) in college, which helped me to boosted my confidence, and improved my public speaking skills. These experiences helped shape my personal and professional growth and remain close to my heart.

column24: I am living my life as a student for past 5 years. Learning a lot, shaping myself a lot, contemplating the world, people and things around me, finding myself in it. I have never shared this with anyone, I am confused in defining success in life. What is success, many people I met in my life have different meaning for it, different ambition for it but I do not contain that success as they say. Everytime a person that I know or a stranger says this is the success I want to make in my life, this is the ultimate goal in my life as becoming this or that great person, I ask whether is that the real success? From all the stories I hear I don't want to be a successful person as they contain it. I don't want to be a person who dwells on a place where things become cozy, a job with high salaries, I do not want to work abroad, I do not need a house of thousands and thousands of square feets, with cars, so modern and equipped. I have something else in my mind. I hope for better future where I would want to lend my hands and shoulder to others also living my life full without chasing any materialistic things.

column25:
Achievements

Business & Startup Achievements (Softrate Global Technology)
	•	Successfully onboarded new clients by understanding their needs and customizing proposals in the social impact, education, and tech consulting sectors.
	•	Contributed to the branding and growth strategy of Softrate’s services by linking social sector expertise with tech solutions.
	•	Helped build a partnership pipeline for potential collaborations in education technology and NGO platforms.
	•	Played a key role in pitching service offerings, handling client communication, and shaping initial project scopes.


Academic & Leadership Achievements
	•	Best Volunteer Award (2019–2020) – Received from Loyola College, Chennai for outstanding dedication and service in community outreach programs.
	•	Joint Secretary of SEWA Social Work Students Forum (2021–2022) – Played a key leadership role in planning student activities and promoting social policy awareness.
	•	Program Convenor (2022)  Organized a national conference on Social Policies in India for young social work professionals, coordinating speakers, sessions, and student involvement.
	•	Rally Convenor (2021) – Led a Human Rights awareness rally in Kalambakkam, mobilizing 200+ villagers.


Global & Public Engagement
	•	Represented India in the “Dialogues Between Global North and South Students” program, University of Michigan School of Social Work.
	•	Delivered guest lectures on AI and education at:
	•	MCC (Study Abroad Program) – Spoke to 300+ students
	•	Loyola College – Reached 500+ students
	•	Loganatha Government College – Reached 100+ students



World Record Participation
	•	Participated in SMILE CHENNAI, a Guinness World Record event for the “Most People Brushing Their Teeth Simultaneously in a Single Venue (23,615 participants)” – certified by the Asia and India Book of Records.
